jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Navin's - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navin's. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Property Consultant to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About Navin's:
Navin's is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navin's!
